title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
